---
title: "Brand detection during preview"
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
---

Voir la [documentation](https://example.com).

When a sibling `_brand.yml` sets `primary: imperial-red`, the link above
turns red in the Typst output. Adding or removing `_brand.yml` while a
`quarto preview` session is running is the behavior under test.
